mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM t_auth_role r INNER JOIN t_auth_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT p.perm_code FROM t_auth_permission p INNER JOIN t_auth_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.perm_id INNER JOIN t_auth_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0
